patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (patient ID 104) with multiple outpatient encounters across Singing River and Piedmont systems. Active problem list entries include Mixed dyslipidemia and Essential hypertension (Singing River) and Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (Piedmont). Hematologic concerns include postoperative and unspecified anemia. A colonoscopy with biopsy is scheduled for 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Notable labs: Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL (07/03/2023), Iron 41 (L) ug/dL and Iron Saturation 15 (L) % (07/03/2023), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2 (07/03/2023), triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL (07/03/2023). Multiple care team members documented, including Hand HA MD (PCP) and several specialists. Documented conflicts include inconsistent DOB and smoking/legal sex entries across source documents.
